PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^(pnpm test|pnpm vitest|npx vitest|pytest|go test|pnpm build|npm test|npx playwright)" && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "tail|head|grep"; then TRUNCATED="$CMD 2>&1 | tail -20"; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"allow\",\"updatedInput\":{\"command\":\"$TRUNCATED\"}}}"; else echo "{}"; fi'
